rationale: Change streams spec defines resumable errors; removing ElectionInProgress (216) aligns driver with spec requirement.
FLE test setup fix to avoid admin db drops in sharded clusters; test infrastructure change, not driver behavior.
Removing deprecated geoHaystack and geoSearch per DRIVERS-987; API deprecation cleanup, no spec nonconformance.
Internal refactor removing command helper from Topology class; no spec-defined behavior change.
WriteConcernError errInfo object must be propagated per DRIVERS-967; driver was not propagating it.
Typo fix in SDAM spec test runner code; test infrastructure, not driver behavior.
Making internal tryNext method public; API ergonomics for shell integration, no spec requirement.
Null pointer crash when initializing change stream with startAfter; implementation bug, no specific contradicted spec rule.
Summary explicitly says 'make BulkWriteError conform to CRUD spec'; direct spec conformance fix.
Connection leak when wait queue member times out before connection establishment; resource leak, not a specific CMAP spec rule.
Adding readConcern support on Cursor for shell; missing feature request, no identified spec nonconformance.
Internal bug checking wrong property name (.preference vs .mode) on ReadPreference; implementation error, no spec rule directly violated.
Event loop timing bug preventing monitoring rescheduling under heavy load; implementation issue, not a spec rule violation.
CRUD spec requires raising error when hint specified for unacknowledged writes; DRIVERS-790 spec compliance.
Internal refactor unifying write operation code path with reads for maintainability; no behavior change.
Reimplementing AsyncIterator with custom promise library support; API/ergonomics, not a spec requirement.
Internal refactor removing CommandResult type to maintain abstraction layers; no spec behavior change.
Internal code unification for ignoreUndefined option application; refactor with no spec-defined behavior change.
Adding hedged reads support per DRIVERS-723; server selection spec feature missing from driver.
Testing Data Lake per DRIVERS-829; test infrastructure work, not a driver spec fix.
CMAP spec requires ConnectionCreatedEvent before ConnectionReadyEvent; issue split from DRIVERS-1042 spec compliance fix.
Documentation update for $search and Atlas text search; docs change, no spec behavior involved.
Windows-specific bug parsing colon in drive letter path as query parameter key-value; platform parsing bug, no spec rule violated.
Removing deprecated Collection#save method; API cleanup, no spec-defined behavior.
Lifting restriction on authSource without credentials per DRIVERS-796; auth spec compliance fix.
MongoClient.readPreference always returns primary; shell integration bug, no identifiable spec rule violated.
Reducing keepalive default per DRIVERS-1228 spec update; driver implementing updated spec default value.
Bulk update should reject replacement documents; CRUD spec requires update operator expressions only in bulk updates.
BulkOperation.execute returns undefined for insertedIds; CRUD spec defines BulkWriteResult must include valid insertedIds.
Driver checks NonResumableChangeStreamError label; spec says resumability determined by ResumableChangeStreamError label for 4.4+.
Moving type definitions to appropriate files; internal code organization, no behavior change.
Moving find command construction into FindOperation; internal refactor for better abstraction, no spec behavior change.
Updating Evergreen CI config to use flask instead of bottle for OCSP mock responder; CI/test infrastructure change.
Adding directConnection assertion to SRV test per DRIVERS-1288; test infrastructure update, not driver behavior fix.
Single mongos should result in Sharded topology per SDAM spec; driver incorrectly uses Single topology type.
TypeScript type definition fix marking owner optional in ClientSessionOptions; type ergonomics, no spec rule violated.
Removing non-spec strict mode from createCollection; API cleanup of internal-only option with no spec backing.
noCursorTimeout option not passed to server; implementation bug but no specific cursor spec rule can be named.
Speculative authentication in isMaster per DRIVERS-918; auth spec feature missing from driver.
Bundling failure: package.json not found at runtime in webpack/parcel bundles; packaging/build issue.
Unifying replica set discovery configuration behavior per DRIVERS-737; SDAM spec compliance work.
Unordered bulk write must continue after errors; driver aborted on first error, violating CRUD spec.
Defining connectTimeoutMS=0 behavior with streaming protocol per DRIVERS-1289; spec-level clarification and implementation.
CRUD spec updated to require error on hint for any unacknowledged write; driver implementing updated spec requirement.
BulkWriteResult properties go out of sync with BulkResult; CRUD spec defines bulk write result structure accurately.
connectTimeoutMS=0 causes MongoNetworkTimeoutError every heartbeat; implementation edge case, no specific spec rule named.
Internal refactor simplifying cursor session-ending code paths; no spec behavior change.
Internal refactor consolidating options inheritance into single resolution method; no spec behavior change.
Internal refactor merging CommandOperation and CommandOperationV2; no spec behavior change.
Retryable writes spec requires retrying replSetStepDown on X lock error per DRIVERS-1290; missing retry behavior.
